creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
Did you test this update? I got:

=======================<phase: patch          >============================
===>  Patching for gophernicus-3.1.1

No file to patch.  Skipping...
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to gophernicus.h.rej
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-gophernicus.h
===> FAILED to apply cleanly FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-gophernicus.h
*** Error code 1
